name: LiveCodes
description: A feature-rich, open-source, client-side code playground that runs 90+ languages and frameworks directly in the browser. Self-hosting serves the prebuilt static app via nginx with no backend required.

notes.text: LiveCodes is fully client-side; the container only serves the static build with nginx. Optional server-side features (broadcast, share, separate-origin sandbox) require the project's Docker setup and are out of scope for this script.
Access runs on plain HTTP (port 80). Put it behind a reverse proxy with TLS for public exposure.
